nasb.text: According to the terms of the law which they teach you, and according to the verdict which they tell you, you shall do; you shall not turn aside from the word which they declare to you, to the right or the left.

esv.text: According to the instructions that they give you, and according to the decision which they pronounce to you, you shall do. You shall not turn aside from the verdict that they declare to you, either to the right hand or to the left.

cnv.text: 你要按著他們指教你的律法，和照著他們告訴你的判斷去行；他們告訴你的話，你不可偏左或偏右。

ccb.text: 他们教导你们律法，宣布判决后，你们必须完全执行，丝毫不可偏离。
